CGTN Radio

Copied

While athletes put up amazing performances at the 2024 Paris Summer Olympics, addressing the issue of doping that is always a threat to undermine the integrity of the prestigious competition is crucial. In this episode, we touch on the controversies over the case in which the United States Anti-Doping Agency (USADA) allegedly allowed athletes who tested positive for banned substances to compete at past editions of the Olympics and other events without facing proper sanctions, while launching criticism over the food contamination incident involving Chinese swimmers. In addition, we talk about the breakthrough performances of Chinese Olympians in Paris and memorable moments at the Games.
